notes: All dependency modules verified: signals.ts exports BrowserSignals, geo.ts exports GeoHint, pointer.ts exports PointerState — names and shapes match plan assumptions exactly.
src/visual/mappings.ts confirmed not yet created — no collision risk.
PointerState.speed field exists as assumed; plan's pointerToDisturbance scaling from ~0-0.1 range is consistent with the implementation in pointer.ts.
AnalyserPipeline exports frequency as Uint8Array — plan's decision to accept pre-averaged 0-255 numbers keeps mappings decoupled from buffer layout, which is correct.
sessionSeed.test.ts confirms the test patterns the plan intends to follow (vi.spyOn, vi.resetModules, describe/it, storage spies).
7 mappings exceeds the AC minimum of 4.
All 4 acceptance criteria are addressed with clear verification paths.
